summary: This Islamic lecture from the Muslim Community Center of Tucson discusses the role of Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him) in liberating humanity from the chains and yolks of pre-Islamic ignorance (Jahiliyyah). The speaker explains how the Prophet freed people from superstitions, oppressive laws, and fear-based beliefs while establishing submission only to Allah. The lecture then transitions to discussing the Islamic concept of divine decree (Qadr) and free will, explaining how Allah predetermined all things while humans possess genuine free will and accountability for their choices.
suggested_title: Prophet Muhammad's Message of Liberation and the Balance Between Divine Decree and Human Free Will
hadith_chapter: Various chapters on superstitions and divine decree
catchy_title: How Prophet Muhammad Freed Us From Spiritual Chains
